subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up and for your interest in exploring a potential partnership.

We would be glad to schedule a 30-minute call. The following slots are currently available:

- 21 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00 (your local time)
- 22 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00 (your local time)
- 23 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00 (your local time)

Please let us know which of these windows works best for you, and we will confirm the exact time and send a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, we’re not able to share internal contact information. For reaching the appropriate teams and leadership, please use the public contact channels listed on our website.

Best regards,
Agent
